en: And the people of Israel again did what was evil in the sight of the LORD after Ehud died.
zh: 以笏死後，以色列人又行了耶和華看為惡的事。

en: And the LORD sold them into the hand of Jabin king of Canaan, who reigned in Hazor. The commander of his army was Sisera, who lived in Harosheth-hagoyim.
zh: 因此耶和華把他們交在迦南王耶賓手中，耶賓那時在夏瑣作王；他的軍長西西拉，住在夏羅設歌印。

en: Then the people of Israel cried out to the LORD for help, for he had 900 chariots of iron and he oppressed the people of Israel cruelly for twenty years.
zh: 耶賓王有鐵車九百輛，他極力欺壓以色列人二十年，以色列人就哀求耶和華。

en: Now Deborah, a prophetess, the wife of Lappidoth, was judging Israel at that time.
zh: 有一位女先知底波拉，是拉比多的妻子，那時正治理以色列人。

en: She used to sit under the palm of Deborah between Ramah and Bethel in the hill country of Ephraim, and the people of Israel came up to her for judgment.
zh: 她常坐在以法蓮山地，拉瑪和伯特利之間那棵底波拉棕樹下；以色列人都上到她那裡去聽判斷。

en: She sent and summoned Barak the son of Abinoam from Kedesh-naphtali and said to him, "Has not the LORD, the God of Israel, commanded you, 'Go, gather your men at Mount Tabor, taking 10,000 from the people of Naphtali and the people of Zebulun.
zh: 底波拉派人去從拿弗他利的基低斯，把亞比挪菴的兒子巴拉召了來，對他說：“耶和華以色列的 神不是曾吩咐你說：‘你去向他泊山進軍，從拿弗他利人和西布倫人中率領一萬人與你同去嗎？

en: And I will draw out Sisera, the general of Jabin's army, to meet you by the river Kishon with his chariots and his troops, and I will give him into your hand'?"
zh: 我必引耶賓的軍長西西拉，和他的車輛與全軍，到基順河往你那裡去；我必把他們交在你手裡。’”

en: Barak said to her, "If you will go with me, I will go, but if you will not go with me, I will not go."
zh: 巴拉對她說：“如果你與我同去，我就去；如果你不與我同去，我就不去。”

en: And she said, "I will surely go with you. Nevertheless, the road on which you are going will not lead to your glory, for the LORD will sell Sisera into the hand of a woman." Then Deborah arose and went with Barak to Kedesh.
zh: 底波拉回答：“我必與你同去，只是你這次行程就沒有光榮；因為耶和華要把西西拉交在一個婦人手裡。”於是底波拉起來，與巴拉一同到基低斯去了。

en: And Barak called out Zebulun and Naphtali to Kedesh. And 10,000 men went up at his heels, and Deborah went up with him.
zh: 巴拉就召集西布倫人和拿弗他利人到基低斯；與他一同步行上去的有一萬人，底波拉也與他一同上去。

en: Now Heber the Kenite had separated from the Kenites, the descendants of Hobab the father-in-law of Moses, and had pitched his tent as far away as the oak in Zaanannim, which is near Kedesh.
zh: 摩西的岳父何巴的子孫基尼人希伯，曾經離開基尼族人，到靠近基低斯的撒拿音的橡樹旁，支搭帳棚居住。

en: When Sisera was told that Barak the son of Abinoam had gone up to Mount Tabor,
zh: 有人告訴西西拉，亞比挪菴的兒子巴拉已經上了他泊山；

en: Sisera called out all his chariots, 900 chariots of iron, and all the men who were with him, from Harosheth-hagoyim to the river Kishon.
zh: 西西拉就召集他所有的車輛，就是九百輛鐵車，和與他在一起的眾人，都從夏羅設歌印出來，到基順河那裡。

en: And Deborah said to Barak, "Up! For this is the day in which the LORD has given Sisera into your hand. Does not the LORD go out before you?" So Barak went down from Mount Tabor with 10,000 men following him.
zh: 底波拉對巴拉說：“你起來吧，因為今日就是耶和華把西西拉交在你手裡的日子；耶和華不是在你前面出戰嗎？”於是巴拉和跟隨他的一萬人從他泊山下來。

en: And the LORD routed Sisera and all his chariots and all his army before Barak by the edge of the sword. And Sisera got down from his chariot and fled away on foot.
zh: 耶和華用刀使西西拉和所有的車輛與全軍，都在巴拉面前潰亂；西西拉下了車，步行逃跑。

en: And Barak pursued the chariots and the army to Harosheth-hagoyim, and all the army of Sisera fell by the edge of the sword; not a man was left.
zh: 巴拉追趕西西拉的車輛和軍隊，直到夏羅設歌印；西西拉的全軍都倒在刀下，連一個也沒有留下。

en: But Sisera fled away on foot to the tent of Jael, the wife of Heber the Kenite, for there was peace between Jabin the king of Hazor and the house of Heber the Kenite.
zh: 只有西西拉步行逃跑，到了基尼人希伯的妻子雅億的帳棚那裡；因為夏瑣王耶賓與基尼人希伯的家友好。

en: And Jael came out to meet Sisera and said to him, "Turn aside, my lord; turn aside to me; do not be afraid." So he turned aside to her into the tent, and she covered him with a rug.
zh: 雅億出來迎接西西拉，對他說：“請我主轉過來，到我這裡，不要懼怕。”西西拉就轉到她那裡去，就是轉到她的帳棚裡去；雅億就用毛氈遮蓋他。

en: And he said to her, "Please give me a little water to drink, for I am thirsty." So she opened a skin of milk and gave him a drink and covered him.
zh: 西西拉對雅億說：“請給我一點水喝，因為我渴了。”雅億就打開盛奶的皮袋，給他喝了，再把他蓋著。

en: And he said to her, "Stand at the opening of the tent, and if any man comes and asks you, 'Is anyone here?' say, 'No.'"
zh: 西西拉又對雅億說：“請你站在帳棚門口，如果有人來問你：‘這裡有人嗎？’你就要回答：‘沒有。’”

en: But Jael the wife of Heber took a tent peg, and took a hammer in her hand. Then she went softly to him and drove the peg into his temple until it went down into the ground while he was lying fast asleep from weariness. So he died.
zh: 希伯的妻子雅億取了一根帳棚的橛子，手裡拿著鎚子，靜悄悄地走到西西拉那裡，把橛子釘在他的太陽穴裡，直釘入地裡；因為西西拉疲乏熟睡，就這樣死了。

en: And behold, as Barak was pursuing Sisera, Jael went out to meet him and said to him, "Come, and I will show you the man whom you are seeking." So he went in to her tent, and there lay Sisera dead, with the tent peg in his temple.
zh: 那時，巴拉追趕西西拉，雅億出來迎接他，對他說：“來吧，我給你看你尋找的人。”他就進到她那裡去；看見西西拉已經仆倒，死了；橛子還在他的太陽穴裡。

en: So on that day God subdued Jabin the king of Canaan before the people of Israel.
zh: 這樣， 神就在那一天，在以色列人面前，制伏了迦南王耶賓。

en: And the hand of the people of Israel pressed harder and harder against Jabin the king of Canaan, until they destroyed Jabin king of Canaan.
zh: 以色列人的勢力日漸強盛，勝過迦南王耶賓，終於把迦南王耶賓除滅。
